content:
Jẹ ki a ṣalaye awọn ọrọ rẹ ki a le dahun ni deede:

- O ni algoridimu asọtẹlẹ sepsis ti o fa ifamọra (alert) nigbati itọka idinku àtọgbẹ (glucose index drop) ba ju 3.7 lọ.
- Window atunṣe (adjustment window) jẹ wakati 4.
- Igbagbogbo idinku (rate of decrease) jẹ 0.12 fun wakati kan.
- O n beere boya o yẹ ki a mu ifamọra naa pọ si 3.2 ṣaaju akoko àrùn àtọgbẹ (pre-sepsis time).

Ni akọkọ, jẹ ki a ṣe iṣiro boya itọka idinku yoo de 3.7 ni wakati 4 ti window atunṣe, tabi boya o yẹ ki a dinku ifamọra si 3.2 lati fa ifamọ
